Pan Ju śĹėŤąČ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pan Ju (śĹėŤąČ). Commander of the Gates, he ordered his men to fire upon Sima Yi. Pan Ju is a fictional character. Pan Ju was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
